name: Do I need a marketing expert for law firm AI visibility?
description: No, but pros speed it up.[1]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a marketing expert for law firm AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, but pros speed it up.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Not mandatory, but recommended for audits and PR strategy in competitive cities like Phoenix.** DIY works for basics like listings, but pros spot patterns faster. **Key factors:** 1) Time vs. expertise; 2) Local nuances; 3) Ongoing monitoring; 4) Cost offset. Learn audits yourself, hire for complex PR alignment if scaling. Many solos succeed solo.[1][2]
